posts.title: Trump opens up American waters for American fishermen

link_metadata.description: Today I am declaring a National Scallops Day to celebrate an action taken by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) that will open up the Northern Edge of Georges Bank to Scallops Fishing, fulfilling the dream to our Great Fishermen who were so badly treated by the Obama and Biden Administrations, and by the Country of Canada. That will mean millions more pounds of beautiful Wild Scallops a year on the kitchen table of Americans, and more Jobs in Norfolk, Virginia, Cape May, New Jersey, New Bedford, Massachusetts, and essentially all parts of the East Coast. This is in addition to freeing up a massive area off the East Coast for our Great Lobster Fishermen, and others (An Environmental Monument declared by Barack Hussein Obama and Sleepy Joe Biden, that I terminated!), and a half a million square miles of the beautiful Pacific Ocean, where every country was allowed to fish except for our Great American Fishermen! posts.raw_content:
A gay libtard I know told me he was watching The USA vs Bosnia World Cup game. I heard the USA won and was mildly happy about it.

> GO USA DURRRR

Then I saw a picture of the two rosters. Bosnia is almost entirely white and USA team is almost entirely black.

Why would I root for a bunch of joggers over based white Slavs? All because of our flag? 

The flag means very little at this point, now that any third world trash can walk right in, plop out a baby and establish their family as “American.” Being American used to mean something profound, now it means nothing.

The rest of the world is basically united in their hatred of white people and their goal of infiltrating our countries and exterminating us. But I’m supposed to have more allegiance with a beaner and a jogger all because of where there mom decided to vacation when they were born?

Imagine you want to do something patriotic. How about join the military? Oh look it is filled with minorities who have no real allegiance to true Americanism at all. They worship some bastardized 1960s version of MLK Americanism. They’re vastly overrepresented in non combat roles and vastly underrepresented in combat and special forces. Many of them are there for the benefits only. The military is just becoming another welfare institution. Theres still heroes there but overall the institution is not preserving American (white) liberty it is just propping up the abomination of modern MLK AMERICA. 

Theres no point in being an American patriot anymore as sad as that is. I’m pro white now. Any minority who was actually based will understand this and also join the pro-white cause. Being pro-American today is basically just being a naive cuck clinging to a dead idealogy while white people are exterminated.
